title: Batales
content: Batales is a botanical name of an order of flowering plant s. This name was used in several systems, sometimes in the spelling Batidales. Often this order consisted of the genus "Batis" only. In the 1981 version of the Cronquist system it was an order placed in subclass Dilleniidae with the following circumscription: The APG II system, used here, includes all the plants involved in the (expanded) order "Brassicales".
